mechanism: Adulthood is treated as morally finished after adolescence
possible_dampener: Lifespan framing and adult role analysis

mechanism: Aging is assumed to automatically produce wisdom
possible_dampener: Nonlinear models and evidence-based aging interpretation

mechanism: Aging is treated only as loss or decline
possible_dampener: Dignity-centered models of changing capacity and agency

mechanism: Caregiving responsibility narrows moral capacity through exhaustion
possible_dampener: Shared care infrastructure respite and social support

mechanism: Work and institutions suppress conscience and moral action
possible_dampener: Voice safety accountability and role responsibility mapping

mechanism: Regret becomes rumination or defensiveness rather than action
possible_dampener: Apology restitution testimony and changed conduct

mechanism: Older adults are treated as less visible or less morally agentic
possible_dampener: Dignity autonomy voice and participatory care design
